Dependencies

Dependency coverage by revision, package source, and runner platform.

Repository
-
VIPC Files
-
Monitored dependency files
Checked files produce dependency warnings and participate in dependency-file change detection. Installing or rebuilding dependencies before actions still requires automatic dependency installation.
Saving needs a fine-grained token with Actions: Read and write for this repository.
Create a token

VIPM / VIPC Packages

Repository VIPC files and the VIPM packages they request, plus VIPM dependencies requested by .dragon files.

NI Package Manager Installed Dependencies

NI software installed or expected through NI Package Manager, including LabVIEW and UTF, plus NIPM dependencies requested by .dragon files.

System Components

CI runtime components that are not installed by VIPM or NI Package Manager.
